AFK_Move_Warning.en-US: You will be moved to spectator in {{yellow}}{0}{{default}} seconds if you remain AFK.

AFK_Move_Announce.en-US: {{green}}{0}{{default}} was moved to spectator for being AFK.

AFK_Kick_Warning.en-US: You will be kicked in {{red}}{0}{{default}} seconds if you remain AFK.

AFK_Kick_Message.en-US: You were kicked for being AFK.

AFK_Spawn_Move_Warning.en-US: Start moving within {{yellow}}{0}{{default}} seconds or you will be moved to spectator.
